channel.title: RMT 379 on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in RMT 379 on RaihnForge

item.title: Three Facts, Three Questions
item.description: A note on naming. The original paper named the specific EdTech employer, its flagship product, and the device and productivity ecosystem the platform depends on. For public posting, all of these have been generalized: “the organization,” “the survey platform,” and “a major cloud productivity suite and device ecosystem.” The analysis is preserved. The intent was always portfolio reflection on the habit of pre-employment diligence, not commentary on any specific commercial entity.

item.title: Identify Prospective Employers
item.description:
A note on naming. The original paper named the student’s current employer. For public posting, that entry has been generalized to “the EdTech employer.” Public companies that the student was researching as future career targets remain named, since identifying them is the whole point of a prospective-employer exercise.

TO: Course Instructor FROM: Joshua Keyes DATE: January 14, 2023 SUBJECT: Identify Prospective Employers, A01

Organizational Internship Interest

The following is a list of internships that I would be interested in applying for, with quick reference notes for each.
